summary: Phased remediation and security hardening checklist for organizations integrated with the Remita payment platform. Five phases: Emergency Response (0-24h), Forensic Assessment (24-72h), Hardening (1-2 weeks), Governance & Compliance (2-4 weeks), and Continuous Improvement (ongoing). Covers credential rotation, access control, transaction auditing, network/application/data security, regulatory notifications (NDPC, CBN), and third-party risk management.
